message:
test(unit): expand diagnostic.rs inline tests (13→54) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 41 new unit tests for diagnostic bundle generation covering:
- dir_size: empty dir, with files, nonexistent path
- DiagnosticOptions: defaults and custom values
- DiagnosticResult/EnvironmentInfo/ConfigSummary serialization
- redact_reservation: structure preservation, secret redaction, released state
- redact_step: structure preservation, secret redaction, none policy
- generate_rule_traces: empty events, non-object/array/null extracted data
- gather_db_health: missing WAL, invalid path, missing tables
- write_json_file: nested data, empty object, invalid directory
- redact_audit: none fields, input summary redaction
- redact_events: empty list, no matched text, handled status
- BundleManifest/TraceEvidence/EventRuleTrace/RedactedWorkflow serialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
